fields.name: is_superuser
fields.help_text: Designates that this user has all permissions without explicitly assigning them.

fields.name: display_name
fields.help_text: Full name or title shown in audit logs and admin panel

fields.name: department_label
fields.help_text: Override label shown on announcements. Auto-filled from department if blank.

fields.name: show_email_public
fields.help_text: Allow email to be shown in public directory
The groups this user belongs to. A user will get all permissions granted to each of their groups.

fields.name: course_code
fields.help_text: Academic program that primarily uses this room (e.g. BSIT, BSCS)

fields.name: course_color
fields.help_text: Hex highlight color for map (e.g. #FF5722). Auto-assigned if blank.

fields.name: source_label
fields.help_text: Department or office name shown on the mobile card

fields.name: source_color
fields.help_text: Color key: red, dark_blue, green, charcoal, purple, teal, amber, blue, dark_green, indigo, brown, orange

fields.name: location
fields.help_text: Optional campus location name this feedback relates to

fields.name: source_label
fields.help_text: Department label shown on the mobile notification card

fields.name: source_color
fields.help_text: Color key for the department chip on mobile

fields.name: target_department
fields.help_text: Set when scope=department to filter which users see this

fields.name: rejection_note
fields.help_text: Reason for rejection — shown to the submitting admin
